ingredients.text: saborizante artificial de Cookies and Cream

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Yogurt 89.7% [Leche fluida de vaca, azúcar granulado, leche descremada en polvo, estabilizante (SIN-440, SIN-1421, gelatina), Cultivos lácteos (Lactobacillus Bulgaricus, Streptococcus Thermophilus), Cultivos probióticos (Lactobacillus acidophilus, bifidobacterium), regulador de la acidez (SIN-331iii), saborizante artificial de Cookies and Cream], Hojuelas de Trigo sabor Chocolate 10.3% [Harina de trigo fortificada, azúcar granulado, cocoa en polvo, extracto de malta en polvo, emulsionante (SIN-322i), agente endurecedor (SIN-170i), sal, aceite vegetal de palma].
